data.body: AC amendment: Also update plugins/dso/README.md line 22: change 'See `docs/INSTALL.md`' to 'See `INSTALL.md`' (or a root-relative reference). The relative path from plugins/dso/README.md resolves to plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md — after deletion this would be a broken reference that blocks check-referential-integrity.sh. Add acceptance criterion: ! grep -q 'docs/INSTALL\.md' plugins/dso/README.md
